columns.name: age_group
columns.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN AGE_YEARS < 18 THEN 'Pediatric' WHEN AGE_YEARS BETWEEN 18 AND 64 THEN 'Adult' ELSE 'Geriatric' END
columns.direct_expression: CASE WHEN AGE_YEARS < 18 THEN 'Pediatric' WHEN AGE_YEARS BETWEEN 18 AND 64 THEN 'Adult' ELSE 'Geriatric' END AS age_group
